description: Local additive config — extends whatever org-level renovate config the bot is configured with. Tracks the centralized version pins in image-versions.env so they stay current alongside the docker-compose fallback defaults.

customManagers.description: Bump every VERSION variable in image-versions.env. Each line is preceded by a `# renovate: datasource=… depName=…` comment that tells the bot what the variable refers to.

Bump grafana/k8s-monitoring chart version pinned in k8s/*/README.md install commands. The other two charts in each scenario (backend + grafana) are intentionally unpinned (`helm install` resolves latest at run time), so only k8s-monitoring needs tracking.
